rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The CLI handler parsed --provider but never passed it in the options object to bootstrapCommand, silently dropping it downstream.","scope":"src/server/payload"},{"kind":"convention","text":"parseProviderModel expects 'provider/model' format (e.g. 'minimax/MiniMax-M1'), not separate provider and model args.","scope":"src/server/payload"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Minimal 2-line fix: pass provider in the CLI handler options and combine provider+model into the required 'provider/model' string.","scope":"src/server/payload"}]}
